# Steamworks SDK

Not committed — proprietary. Download from https://partner.steamgames.com/downloads/list

Unpack so the layout is:

    engine/vendor/steamworks/
        public/
            steam/
                steam_api.h
                isteaminput.h
                ...
        redistributable_bin/
            linux64/
                libsteam_api.so
                libsteam_api.so.dbg

Tested against SDK 1.59+. Requires a free Steamworks partner account.
